mentions.note: Eclectic specialty retailer uniting all economic groups; appeal to families wanting fun without premium prices. Approved to buy now, will add post-earnings.

Turnaround complete under CEO Winnie Park: 15.4% comp growth, $4.31 EPS beat, exceptional guidance. Social media focus and simplified ops drive Gen Alpha targeting. Stock +3x in 12 months with more room to run.
Discretionary retailer selling 100% discretionary goods getting absolutely slaughtered; war and consumer weakness fears driving panic.
One of strongest stocks this year; like it very much and would buy ahead of Wednesday quarter given consistency and pricing power.
Discretionary bargain retailer lost luster; remained cautious on macro and consumer sentiment. No raise to guidance, stock down 14%. Days of bargain stores as recession play are over.
